name: Sunday Startup Artichokes
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a casserole, render the pancetta until crisp.
2. Add the mushrooms and sauté for a couple of minutes.
3. Cover and cook until tender.
4. Add the garlic and herbs; sauté for a minute.
5. Add the bread crumbs and season to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Remove the stuffing from the casserole and set aside.
7. Add vegetable oil to the casserole.
8. Sauté the onion and carrot for 5 minutes.
9. Stuff the raw artichokes with the mushroom mixture; place them over the vegetables.
10. Add the white wine, bring it to a boil.
11. Cover the casserole and simmer over very low heat for 1 1/2 hours or until tender.
12. Remove the artichokes from the heat and reduce the liquid over high heat until concentrated.
13. Season to taste with salt and pepper; spoon over the artichokes.
An alternative way of doing this is to use precooked artichokes and simmer them, stuffed, for 30 minutes to heat and cook the stuffing.
